label: Shoulder impingement
notes: Avoid loaded overhead work and ballistic/kipping shoulder loading; prefer neutral-grip, below-shoulder work.

label: Lower back strain
notes: Avoid heavy axial loading and ballistic hinging; light controlled hinging (e.g., Romanian Deadlift) is acceptable.

label: Knee pain
notes: Avoid loaded end-range knee flexion and impact; prefer box squats to a comfortable height and low-impact cardio.

label: Wrist pain
notes: Avoid loaded wrist extension; use dumbbells/neutral grip where possible.

label: Elbow tendinopathy
notes: Avoid ballistic/kipping pulling; strict controlled pulling and supported rows are acceptable.

label: Ankle sprain
notes: Avoid impact/plyometrics; use low-impact monostructural substitutes.

label: Hip flexor strain
notes: Avoid loaded/explosive hip flexion. Power Clean listed explicitly: the violent pull-under stresses hip flexors in a way its stress tags don't capture.

label: Quadriceps strain
notes: Avoid loaded/explosive knee extension; unloaded squatting to a comfortable depth and low-impact cardio are acceptable.

label: Hamstring strain
notes: Avoid loaded hinging, long-length hamstring loading, and sprinting; bike is the preferred conditioning.

label: Calf strain
notes: Avoid jumping, rope work, and running; bike or row for conditioning.

label: Pectoral strain
notes: Avoid loaded pressing through a deep pec stretch; light reduced-range pressing (e.g., knee push-ups) as tolerated.

label: Biceps strain
notes: Avoid high-load and ballistic pulling; supported rows and banded pull-ups as tolerated.
